{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321121139BACB051AA7A4F51184EA"}"},"total":155},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7263741588319535933","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这么好的题材不写无限文太可惜了，这种大世界观很难把握，特别是寄生兽，东京喰种，鬼灭和巨人，战力高低很离谱，寄生兽有现代军队打，东京食种能被22层的钢筋砸死，鬼灭背景还是火枪和蒸汽火车，巨人后期除了那些有名字的巨人，其他的在二战武器下根本没有还手之力，很难绷得住，强的人物也离谱，一个超大巨一炸前面什么寄生兽和喰种渣都不剩。只要把握得住，文笔在线，没什么太大的毒点，火是必然的。加油作者！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691221698,"group_id":"7255281343775378495","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1yp/87va1lHc/75OvbRfa0=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2ad38c36b0ad48f182f11ce08aa129c3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776622828&x-signature=%2FjWaDw%2BGOsqVU23ghWy0pxbS5xY%3D","user_id":"307470941570071","user_name":"上杉琉璃雪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"307470941570071","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7255281343775378495","book_info":{"abstract":"【综漫】+【无系统】+【口胡】
【阅前须知：主角交友杀人纯凭个人喜好，唯我独尊的无脑疯批和天煞孤星别来沾边儿！！！】
功夫青年艾英良一朝穿越，成为吃货综漫的永近英良，所有怪物都对他垂涎欲滴！
房间里，长着钻头状口器和许多眼睛的虫子，正要想吃掉他的脑子。
推开门，脑袋裂成四瓣的邻居询问他是不是同类。
街道上，食人的喰种传说在人们口中流传。
城市中，CCG的大楼高耸入云。
城市外，还有三重数十米的巨大围墙封闭：
一重墙外，鬼杀队在夜幕中厮杀；
二重墙外，只有骏城能穿越重重卡巴内，勾连城寨；
三重墙外，巨人们正在蠢蠢欲动。
面对怪物们的垂涎欲滴，永近英良觉醒六库仙贼：你们是猎物，我才是猎人！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o9ec059a833535da5bfafdbc02a326bc2~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"恕己奉壹","author_id":"","book_id":"7255281343775378495","book_name":"他们都想吃掉我","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7255283074475721235","read_count":"201","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"526718"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"201","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,综漫,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o9ec059a833535da5bfafdbc02a326bc2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779250300&x-signature=VF3%2BN5PZPsVISYTTKoVDZ9ntM%2Bw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2805574047382728","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.737643e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321121139BACB051AA7A4F51184EA"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat"
